programme.title: Jamie: Fast and Simple (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie makes a Korean-inspired Gochujang chicken traybake, shows us eight ways to use salmon fillets, creates a spectacular quesadilla toastie and tops it all off with a no-cook, banoffee fro-yo tart.

programme.title: Hidden Retreats
programme.desc: Some truly remarkable and hidden retreats in Canada, Iceland, Sweden and the UK.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show (S33)
programme.desc: Graham Norton presents a lively chat show featuring Bruce Springsteen, Jeremy Allen White, Jennifer Lawrence, Tessa Thompson and Florence + The Machine.

programme.title: Jamie: Fast and Simple (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie makes a Korean-inspired Gochujang chicken traybake, shows us eight ways to use salmon fillets, creates a spectacular quesadilla toastie and tops it all off with a no-cook, banoffee fro-yo tart.

programme.title: Speedy Suppers
programme.desc: Don't have much time to spare? Donal’s got four recipes that are a whiz. Starting with a brown-butter fried fish with salt-crust potatoes and a romesco sauce - an Irish twist to a Spanish classic.

programme.title: Patisserie Week
programme.desc: There's patisserie pandemonium as the semi-finalists make cream horns, glass domes and showstopping macarons. Whose cream horn fills the judges with Parisian pleasure? And whose dome sends them home?

programme.title: Abducted At An HBCU: A Black Girl Missing Movie
programme.desc: When ambitious college student Shannon disappears due to financial struggles, her counselor Ellen discovers a trafficking ring targeting students like her and must fight to rescue Shannon.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: Famous mystery writer Victoria Rollins is presumed dead until her social-media page announces her new novel. But when a fan tries to confirm the author's existence, she's flung into a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Fried Chicken Monte Cristo
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Chicken Fricassee
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a Southern spin on the classic French-inspired chicken fricassee. She starts by seasoning and browning the chicken, then simmers it in a sauce made with vegetables, cream and white wine.

programme.title: Greek Meatballs And Spaghetti With Feta Sauce
programme.desc: Rachael takes us on a Grecian adventure with a recipe for Greek-style lamb meatballs and her very own creation, feta-sghetti, a spaghetti dish served with a decadent white feta sauce.
Five contestants will get a personal Jamie Oliver masterclass as they try to 'Keep Up with Jamie'. There's no recipe, only the ability to watch Jamie like a hawk to recreate an Oliver family recipe.

programme.title: Geralyn and Art
programme.desc: After recovering from cancer, Geralyn's doctor encouraged her to embrace life with husband Art. Their journey leads to the ocean, where they are on a hunt to find a home that truly speaks to them.

programme.title: Meals in Motion
programme.desc: Join Michael Yo as he circles the world for meals that can't, won't and don't stop. Take a ride in a speedy elevator up a thousand feet to the highest revolving restaurant in Canada.
When we watch comedians on television, they often seem approachable and friendly. But have you ever wondered what their homes look like and how they're decorated? Today's theme is "Comedians' Homes."

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: Famous mystery writer Victoria Rollins is presumed dead until her social-media page announces her new novel. But when a fan tries to confirm the author's existence, she's flung into a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping Of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini's disappearance captivated the nation, but her abduction story unraveled when it was revealed she was not a kidnap victim as she initially claimed.

programme.title: Lump in My Throat
programme.desc: Jack searches for the confidence to try surgery on his throat bump, after fainting during a previous attempt. Bubbly young gym teacher Kristan has given up on love after discovering a growth on her back.
On a friendship trip to Thailand with real friends, the "Dokbakz" gather to celebrate. Their joy is short-lived, as they decide to pick the one who will shoulder the cost of the accommodation.

Today's theme is "Hotel Stay vs. Countryside Stay: The Accommodation Showdown!" For those who are passionate about interior design, places encountered during travels can provide a wealth of inspiration.

The contestants cook for Immunity in a Team Challenge at the Queen Victoria Night Market, with street food on the menu. In teams of five, they must create two dishes, one protein-led and one vegetarian.

programme.title: Jacinthe and Serge
programme.desc: Serge and Jacinthe have often travelled to the East Coast over the years to visit family. Now they want to find a permanent home for their visits, one they can pass down for generations.

programme.title: Chicken Gizzard and Poutine
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a smothered chicken gizzard poutine, which mixes traditional, Southern-fried chicken gizzards with French-Canadian fries, gravy and cheese curds for a decadent global meal.

programme.title: Deep South Bouillabaisse
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.title: Dallas: Ivandell
programme.desc: Without Chauncey's knowledge, Derek purchases a zombie located in an historical conservation district, hindering the way these flippers are able to renovate the house.

programme.title: Spicy Chicken Thighs
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a family-friendly, go-to meal of sauteed chicken thighs marinated with chilli crisp, cooked with mango salsa and served with steamed vegetables.

Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: Dallas: Ivandell
programme.desc: Without Chauncey's knowledge, Derek purchases a zombie located in an historical conservation district, hindering the way these flippers are able to renovate the house.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Hurricane Rescue
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: Diesel Do Right
programme.desc: After being scolded for making a mistake, Diesel plays a trick on Rebecca to try and get the other engines in trouble.

programme.title: Ribbon Fall
programme.desc: The Ribbon Sisters invite Sarah and Duck to their favourite seasonal event in the park.

programme.title: Shallot Circus
programme.desc: The Shallots have discovered acrobatics and are inspired to put on a show.

programme.title: Noisy Night
programme.desc: There's a funny noise around town. It's distracting the children's music practice and keeping everyone else up. Stanley investigates with the help of Myrtle.

programme.title: Delivery
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: I Just Like Worms
programme.desc: From snails called David to Daddy Spider Longlegs', the funny animals talk about all things creepy and crawly.

programme.title: It's Time to Mix Colours
programme.desc: JoJo is painting a picture but runs out of green paint. It's time for a Gran Gran plan!

programme.title: Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: The Grandparents Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Monteverde Cloud Forest, Costa Rica
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save a rare bird's nest and find a lost trophy?

programme.title: Banana
programme.desc: Banana reveals another secret about herself in the opera piece, "I've Got a Secret".

programme.title: Cabbage
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: Dragon Boat Beats
programme.desc: The Supermarket is frozen over and Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Tomato practice for the boat race by using chopsticks for oars, but it doesn't go well as they're out of sync with each other.

programme.title: How to be a Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids a Supertato training film, but Evil Pea sneaks in to take over Tato Tower. The Grape Kids use the rug launcher to eject Evil Pea out of the tower.

programme.title: What's Your Name?
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy a game of 'What's your name?' Later, there's a surprise when a bowl of Tubby Custard joins in with the game!

programme.title: Milk
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'milk' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of milk - pink milk, banana milk and bedtime milk. Dee even gets a milk moustache!

programme.title: Down the Drain
programme.desc: Messy borrows Zoe's umbrella, and it gets swept away by the rain. Messy and his friends go on a white-water adventure down the drain in search for it.

programme.title: Wingsuit Yourself
programme.desc: Tao needs help learning to fly his new wingsuit for a big town event, and Mojo and Bo are the experts. Can they help him find his inner bird before it's too late?

programme.title: Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: The Sibling Badge
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Sea Arch Escape
programme.desc: Xuli's flying race around the Academy inspires cadet Tala to fly the Grimbler. But she crashes into a fragile sea arch that could collapse right on top of her!

programme.title: The Sleepover
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Muffin Cone
programme.desc: When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play `sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Andy and the Bald Eagles
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond's bald eagle feather is damaged, Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to Alaska in search of another. Along the way, he meets a brown bear fishing for salmon.

programme.title: Pockets
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: The Pizza Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are... interesting!

programme.title: Song of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: The Continent of Africa
programme.desc: Glitch takes Tala to the continent of Africa to help her with an Academy project.

programme.title: Avocado
programme.desc: The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: Banana
programme.desc: Banana reveals another secret about herself in the opera piece, "I've Got a Secret".

programme.title: How to be a Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids a Supertato training film, but Evil Pea sneaks in to take over Tato Tower. The Grape Kids use the rug launcher to eject Evil Pea out of the tower.

programme.title: The Throne Thief
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Chilli are playing when, suddenly, they hear a scream and discover an upset Evil Pea in her freezer. Her throne has been stolen! Who would do such a thing?

programme.title: What's Your Name?
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy a game of 'What's your name?' Later, there's a surprise when a bowl of Tubby Custard joins in with the game!

programme.title: Milk
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'milk' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of milk - pink milk, banana milk and bedtime milk. Dee even gets a milk moustache!

programme.title: Down the Drain
programme.desc: Messy borrows Zoe's umbrella, and it gets swept away by the rain. Messy and his friends go on a white-water adventure down the drain in search for it.

programme.title: Wingsuit Yourself
programme.desc: Tao needs help learning to fly his new wingsuit for a big town event, and Mojo and Bo are the experts. Can they help him find his inner bird before it's too late?

programme.title: Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: The Sibling Badge
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Sea Arch Escape
programme.desc: Xuli's flying race around the Academy inspires cadet Tala to fly the Grimbler. But she crashes into a fragile sea arch that could collapse right on top of her!

programme.title: The Sleepover
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Muffin Cone
programme.desc: When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play `sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Andy and the Bald Eagles
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond's bald eagle feather is damaged, Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to Alaska in search of another. Along the way, he meets a brown bear fishing for salmon.

programme.title: Pockets
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: The Pizza Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are... interesting!

programme.title: The Train Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Gliding, Argentina
programme.desc: Glitch gatecrashes an academy gliding test, causing calamity in the skies over Argentina.

programme.title: Valley Of The Balls, Kazakhstan
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters take control of a rocky situation in the Valley of Balls?

programme.title: Thomas Makes a Mistake
programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: Garden Gaming
programme.desc: Duck is getting frustrated with his new computer game, so Sarah builds a new version.

programme.title: Toy Tidy
programme.desc: Duck has been leaving his toys everywhere, so Sarah helps him tidy his bedroom.

programme.title: Can-Bots
programme.desc: Stanley is very busy, so he invents three little robots called the Can Bots to help. They begin well but soon start getting out of hand. Stanley has some reprogramming to do.

programme.title: Noisy Night
programme.desc: There's a funny noise around town. It's distracting the children's music practice and keeping everyone else up. Stanley investigates with the help of Myrtle.

programme.title: I Could Be The Best Dancer In The Whole Entire World

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: 收视指南
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。《收视指南》栏目专门介绍央视的播出内容。

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 记住乡愁
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: 走遍中国
programme.desc: 主要以中国的某一城市（或地域、或主题）为选题范围，选取其最具的历史传承、风土人情、杰出人物、自然风光和发展变化以连续一周每天30分钟播出的大容量，向世界全景式地展现新世纪的中国城市（或地域）形象。

programme.title: 海峡两岸
programme.desc: 节目宗旨是"跟踪海峡热点，反映两岸民意"，节目分为两个版块：第一个是"热点扫描"，主要报道当日的近期台湾岛内的热点新闻；第二个是"热点透视"，当日或近期涉台热点深度报道及两岸专家对此事的评论，并对两岸各个层面的交流交往进行跟踪报道。

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: The Sobibor Revolt
programme.desc: During World War II, the Nazis created specialised Death Camps for killing prisoners. At Sobibor, a group of Jews were forced to keep the camp operational, engineered a daring escape that saved many lives.

programme.title: Shady Secrets
programme.desc: Some secrets refuse to stay buried. Whether it's illicit cargo in a frozen lake, a stolen masterpiece worth millions, or a brothel hidden in the shadow of the Capitol-the truth always resurfaces.

programme.title: Unlocking The Secrets Of Stonehenge
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous prehistoric monuments on Earth. A mysterious arrangement of stones that have adorned the English countryside for millennia. But nobody knows how the landmark was built or why.

programme.desc: Troy and Pickle help a friend look for his lost dog. Bill and Tes search for pythons in a spot ravaged by wildfires. Zak and Bruce investigate an abandoned boat yard.

programme.title: 凤凰聚焦
programme.desc: 《凤凰聚焦》锁定全球和本地重大的时政话题、社会事件及新闻热点，选题超越地域界限，原创性挖掘事件的背景与真相，配以记者的现场调查，梳理来龙去脉，以高清的新闻镜片，摸清看透热点大事，充份展现凤凰团队深挖时事议题的功力。

programme.desc: 文史哲学养深厚的学人何亮亮主持《时事亮亮点》，盘点上周重要而值得关注的新闻热点，展开深入分析，通过夹播夹议，点出事件的症结及延续的影响。

programme.title: 纪录大时代
programme.desc: 联合中国各顶级卫视及电视制作机构，汇聚优秀精品纪录片集中展映。

programme.title: 我们和它们
programme.desc: 以纪实拍摄手法，从人与动物、自然和谐相处的角度，讲述跨物种的感人故事，见证人与动物之间源于爱、超越爱的情感。

programme.title: 有报天天读 (15/4/26)
programme.desc: 有报天天读搜罗全球主流的媒体和重要报纸、杂志的最新资讯和精华焦点，内容充实，资讯丰富，节奏明快，充满动感和创意，是个既有个性，也有独到见解的节目。

programme.title: 凤凰焦点新闻 (15/4/26)

programme.title: 新闻今日谈 (15/4/26)

programme.title: 亚洲财经透视
programme.desc: 立足香港国际金融中心，跟踪每日资本市场动态，聚焦热门政经事件，汇总境内外媒体多元财经观点，第一时间邀请政府官员、顶尖学者、投行分析师等权威嘉宾全方位解读重大财经政策，为观众创造多面向丰富视角。

programme.title: 总编辑时间 (15/4/26)

programme.title: 凤凰大视野
programme.desc: 凤凰卫视力求创新，不为人后，推出凤凰大视野一系列主题性纪录片节目，每周连续播出某一专题，或是社会焦点、或是历史纪念日、或特别行动、独家内幕透析时代局势，一气呵成五集持续播出。

programme.title: 军情观察室

programme.title: 时事直通车 (15/4/26)

programme.title: 凤凰聚焦

This episode features lightweights Nate Campbell, aka 'The Galaxy Warrior', (32-1, 25 KOs) vs. Ali 'Rush Hour' Funeka (30-1, 25 KOs) from the BankAtlantic Center in Sunrise, Florida, USA, on February 14, 2009 in a bout viewed on television by 1.2 million.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manusia Silver Gantengnya Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Dewa (Lavicky Nicholas) moves to the big city with one goal: to get rich and marry his girlfriend back home. But his urban adventure takes a weird turn when he meets Dewi (Larasati Nugroho), a woman who makes a living through a very peculiar and unexpected profession.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: How To Make King of Strawberry Sebelum Hari H
programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man her father chose, Sila (Shanice Margaretha) runs away and crosses paths with Rafan (Hardi Fadhillah). It’s love at first sight for her, but her father isn't giving up so easily. He has already prepared a scheme that is guaranteed to get under Rafan's skin and test their budding romance.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: ORDER AYAM DAPET JODOH
programme.desc: Reta (Angelica Simperler) is a beautiful but incredibly spoiled woman. After hitting Dion (Qausar Harta Yudana) with her car, she arrogantly offers him money instead of an apology. Disgusted by her behavior, Reta’s mother forces her to live and work with Dion for two months to learn humility and change her ways.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Jalan Ke Hatimu
programme.desc: Siska (Aisyah Aqilah) spends her days managing a corn plantation and selling various corn-based treats. Her peaceful life is disrupted when she nearly crashes her truck into Rangga (Junior Roberts), a handsome man who, unbeknownst to her, has been arranged to be her husband by her grandfather. Rangga’s true motive? To marry Siska only so he can sell off her beloved plantation.

programme.desc: An apartment manager unwittingly sets himself up for a peculiar adventure when he rescues a seemingly normal young woman from the pool he maintains.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: A tough US Marshal helps a stubborn young woman track down her father's murderer.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: This brilliant piece continues the saga of two generations of successive power within the Corleone family. With Al Pacino and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Indictment: The Mcmartin Trial
programme.desc: A fact-based drama based on the longest and most expensive trial in American history that ended without a single conviction.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Hostile Waters
programme.desc: When a Russian nuclear submarine collides with an American submarine, the two captains must work together to prevent a nuclear meltdown.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Rachel McAdams and Harrison Ford star in this romantic comedy set in the hilarious and dysfunctional world of morning television.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Three neighbors uncover a hidden fortune in stolen art only to become trapped in a sadistic game of survival set by a suspected serial killer.

programme.title: The Gallows
programme.desc: A group of students find out that some things are better left alone when they attempt to resurrect a production in honour of an actor who died during the school play.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: In this intense revenge chronicle, two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: The First Night With the Duke
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: Dogs Are Incredible 2
programme.desc: For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression or excessive barking from their beloved dogs, experts provide customised training methods and tailored advice - helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: Queen's House
programme.desc: This revenge story is about a woman in the top one per cent who starts over from the ground up to reclaim her stolen life and find her true 'home'. A passionate drama about people striving to regain the true meaning of life.

programme.title: The King of Tears, Lee Bangwon
programme.desc: This historical drama sheds new light on the figure of Lee Bang Won, a leader who took the lead in the founding of the nation.

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: When the end of one week meets the start of another week, this talk show will bring you music and stories that soothe your worries and concerns.

programme.title: Young Lady and Gentleman
programme.desc: To Dandan, her family is an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. The more time she spends with the kids and their father Youngguk, the more she falls for him.

programme.desc: To Dandan, her family is an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. The more time she spends with the kids and their father Youngguk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: The Return of Superman

programme.desc: Noona, You Are a Woman to Me is a lively dating reality show that explores romances between confident older women and charming younger men.

programme.title: Problem Child in House
programme.desc: This is a great "knowledge talk show" where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: Music Bank K-Chart
programme.desc: Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Coolie (1983)
programme.desc: An honest worker rises against injustice when powerful enemies exploit the poor. With courage and determination, he leads a fiery fight for dignity, justice and survival. Release Year: 1983 Director: Manmohan Desai, Prayag Raj

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Aman a meek youngster who is scared of heights, discovers his superpowers when he is forced to face the evil Raka, who is sent by an industrialist to destroy humanity. Release Year: 2016 Director: Remo D'Souza Awards: 2017 Nominee Reader's Choice- Best Choreographer- Rahul ShettyPaul Cardoz

programme.title: Gadar-Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: During the partition, Tara and Sakina's joyful marriage is torn apart when her father forces her to remain in Pakistan, separating her from Tara and their family. Release Year: 2001 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Singh Saab The Great
programme.desc: Singh Saab is a responsible tax collector who believes in honesty, but Bhoodev, a conniving man, plots against him. Singh adopts a unique way to teach Bhoodev a lesson. Release Year: 2013 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Hero No. 1
programme.desc: A wealthy business heir plights his troth to household chores for the sake of love. Posing as Raju, the man of many talents, he sweeps, mops, cooks, sings, and dances his way into the hearts of his girlfriend's near and dear ones. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Taish
programme.desc: A story of friendship and loss of innocence when two worlds clash amid a wedding when a secret exposes a betrayal, and innocent friends converge with dangerous criminals and intense violence. Release Year: 2020 Director: Bejoy Nambiar Awards: 2021 WinnerPopular Award- Most Popular Supporting ActreSS in a Digital Film- Sanjeeda Sheikh, 2021 WinnerJury Award- Best Direction in a Digital Film- Bejoy Nambiar

programme.title: Babumoshai Bandookbaaz
programme.desc: The film is a quirky ride of a reputed contract killer, Babu, and revolves around love, friendship, rivalries, and revenge. Release Year: 2017 Director: Kushan Nandy Awards: 2018 Nominee Popular Award- Best Supporting ActreSS- Divya Dutta

programme.title: Foot Fairy
programme.desc: When a serial killer with a foot fetish goes on the loose in Mumbai targetting young women, CBI officer Vivan Deshmukh is tasked with finding the murderer. Will he succeed? Release Year: 2020 Director: Kanishk Varma

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明识破叶凌霜下毒计策，叶凌霜无法救七海蕊，只能与她一起离开夜北。七海蕊被选为和亲对象，叶凌霜决定陪她同去大晁。途中翼无忧出现试图救走七海蕊，但被界诸婴阻止。同时，大晁内部发生军令冲突，界海天私自调兵导致蓝衣军大败。叶凌霜得知彧修明真实身份后感到震惊。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 好搭档
programme.desc: 讲述人气离婚律师车恩京（张娜拉饰）陷入离婚危机，她与新人律师韩宥利（南志铉饰）经常因案件产生激烈冲突，一场律师间职场斗争即将上演。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵中枪入院，四海前来挑衅，十七气得要抢警务处处长的手枪射杀四海。桂新回到永业银行夺权，十七谎称桂婵已升他为总经理，代理其职务，获一众职员支持。桂婵发现公司没有自己依旧运作如常，内心失落。十七得悉后，率一班职员故意表现得没桂婵不行，哄桂婵开心；十七还骂醒桂新，要让他与桂婵兄妹重归于好。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 夜北与大晁发生战争，大晁君主彧修明斩杀七海震宇，夜北战败。叶凌霜被俘，后利用智谋得到谢雨安的帮助逃到钦天监，被界海天收为徒弟。同时，她身上的琥珀石里困着星算大师云纹，二人达成合作。另一方面，彧修明决定迁移夜北人到越州，引起界海天和界诸婴的不满和困扰。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵到法庭为十七作证，惜十七还是被入罪，在狱中重遇韦豪。十七一度被四海收买的囚犯追打，韦豪寸步不离保护他，囚犯们最终站在十七这边。花香在郊外拜祭时，意外见到四海也来附近拜祭，其后发现该墓地里没有尸体，只有一个古董钟。花香找到大虎的住处，在桂婵的威逼利诱下，大虎终于说出真相……

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 阿夙得知大晁要屠杀夜北人，告知七海伶，二人尽力保护族人。同时，叶凌霜进入钦天监，改名白露，被彧修明要求在十天内算出星瀚大典的吉址。白露听到樊如晦和界海天的对话后，利用自己的聪明才智在彧修明和界海天之间周旋。她从云纹处得知芳华镜在苦渊海，因担忧七海蕊而偷偷出宫。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: When a heat wave hits Seattle and the power goes out, Spencer comes to the rescue with a Norwegian air conditioner.

programme.title: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: #TextingCompetition
programme.desc: Cat discovers Sam is really fast at texting and convinces her to compete in a texting competition against a sweet boy, Butler, who has an overbearing mom. Dice tries to avoid an annoying old friend.

programme.title: Leonardo Saddles Up
programme.desc: The mutant seahorse called MUSTANG SALLY is going to flood the city... and the only thing standing in his way are LEO and Pigeon Pete. Being the leader isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: The Pearl
programme.desc: The East River 3 are on the verge of victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems... what is the PEARL and why does Goldfin want it?

programme.title: The Krusty Slammer / Pineapple RV
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse after Plankton breaks the law, but crime only pays for so long. // SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: Gary's Got Legs / King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. // Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself down and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Bucket Pants / A Best Too Far
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide Grumpy Pants needs more excitement and take him to have the most extreme cup of tea ever. // In this year's Capture the Flag contest Best listens to other people's ideas even if they haven't got a war room.

programme.title: Spoiler Alert / Something Fishy
programme.desc: The twins go to great lengths to protect Best's enjoyment of his book and realize spoilers aren't so bad after all. // Best and Bester may have jumped the line for the new fish restaurant, but once inside things take a dramatic turn.

programme.title: Safety Worst / De-Pat-ment Store
programme.desc: After yet another Star house disaster, the fire marshal forces Patrick to watch a safety training video. // Patrick fails his way up the corporate ladder at Upturn's mall.

programme.title: Visiting Vikings / It's Too Late...With Plankton
programme.desc: For Leif Erikson Day, Patrick and SpongeBob time-travel back to Viking times. // When the Stars go to the mountains, Squidina hires Plankton to entertain the Lawnies.

programme.title: The Nitwitting / The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses. // Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

programme.title: Sandy's Nutmare
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: The Max of Life
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: Captain Man Strikes Out
programme.desc: When Captain Man goes on strike because he refuses to pay for art that he destroyed on a mission, the Vice-Mayor hires a new hero to defend Swellview - Monsieur Man.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Pipers
programme.desc: Henry gets an unexpected visitor claiming to be from the future. When a boy-robot killing machine steps onto the scene, The Gang must find a way to save everyone from an apocalyptic future.

programme.title: Fool's Paradise / Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they're safe. That is, until they break down in front of an unusual motel. // The kids discover Dad isn't at his IT job anymore and is now a dishwasher.

programme.title: Karaless Whisper / Dollars and Scents
programme.desc: Lincoln and friends try to befriend new girl Kara when they learn she has access to a legendary missing comic book. // Miguel enlists Leni's help when he launches his own perfume line at Reininger's.

programme.title: Elecshunned
programme.desc: Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

programme.title: Big Bad Bubble Bass / Sea-Man Sponge Haters Club
programme.desc: Karen tells the fairytale of a nerd trying to steal an action figure from his three little neighbors. // Squidward hosts a secret "We Hate SpongeBob Club" at his house.

programme.title: Food PBBFT! Truck / Upturn Girls
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward try to sell krabby patties from a food truck in the darkest depths of the ocean. // Pearl and Narlene have a whales' day out in the big city.

programme.title: Pineapple RV
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Terror on Tape
programme.desc: The Stars watch a series of haunted video tapes.

programme.title: Cleanin' House
programme.desc: While Bunny's in Klopnod, the Star home becomes a mess.

programme.title: Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: Party Fowl / Sleepless in Royal Woods
programme.desc: When Sergio stays at the Louds, he soon gets into trouble when he doesn't want to hang out with the rest of the pets. // Unable to get Lily to go to sleep, Mom takes her for a drive where they happen to witness a burglary.

programme.title: The Loudest Yard / Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot. // After Lucy reads Lincoln's fortune and claims his day will "end in disaster", Lincoln becomes a hypochondriac.

programme.title: Dance, Dance Resolution / A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: It's the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln's sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: Dubu
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam!

programme.title: SpongeBob LongPants / Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways. // When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: Gary's Got Legs
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Roadie to Nowhere / A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: Selfie Improvement / No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. // Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: Strife of the Party
programme.desc: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it.

programme.title: Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: All About Steve
programme.desc: Billy arrives, hopeful that his new sidekick Steve can join the T-Force. Phoebe and Max consider it, but soon discover that his superpower is making marshmallows. After they reject Steve's bid to join the team, he turns evil and vows revenge.

programme.title: JAM Session
programme.desc: When Ray hears that Piper is going to Junior Anger Management to work on her anger issues, he makes a wager with Henry that he can make her lose her temper before the night ends.

programme.title: iReunite With Missy
programme.desc: When Carly's old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly's best friend.

programme.title: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: The App Came Back
programme.desc: Lay Lay's avatar creator visits Sadie with some changes to the app settings, turning Lay Lay's personality negative, while Sadie tries to restore her best friend's positivity and convince the techie not to shut down the app completely.

programme.title: Summer Camp: Treasure Haunt / Summer Camp: Brawl of the Wild
programme.desc: When Lincoln finds an old pirate's flag at Camp Mastodon, he accidentally raises a zombified Captain Kit! // At Camp Mastodon, Leni clashes with another camp counselors, River, while taking their campers on an excursion in the woods.

programme.title: Left in the Dark / Get the Message
programme.desc: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

programme.title: Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: Swimming Fools / The Goobfather
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip. // Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds "Patty Whips" to the menu at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Too Many Patricks / Much Tofu About Nothing
programme.desc: Patrick hires other Patricks to entertain at parties. // Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.

programme.title: Stair Wars
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict.

programme.title: Funny Business / Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: Diss the Cook / For Sale by Loner
programme.desc: Lincoln is convinced the middle school lunch lady is holding a grudge against him and his older sisters. // Mr. Grouse attempts to find some peace and quiet after moving away from the Louds.

programme.title: Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: J-LAD / Big Honey
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down. // When Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a big, honey-inheritance spiral.

programme.title: Safe Deposit Krabs / Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank, and it's up to SpongeBob & Patrick to save him. // After failing again to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Can't Hardly Wait
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated.

programme.title: Trouble At Smelt Fishing/Lunch Time Is Quiet Time
programme.desc: Shiro competes with Deca at smelt-fishing when traces of the Bobobobobone are detected on fish scales by the frozen lake.

programme.title: The Blossom Files/Find Your Bliss/Bliss Reminisce/Blisster Sister/Breaking Bliss
programme.desc: Blossom's skepticism is put to the test when she believes she's encountered a space alien.

programme.title: Totally Pawsome
programme.desc: Cute kittens threaten WOOHP World and Alex’s heart.

programme.title: Bean Hypnotised/Car Wash
programme.desc: Mr Bean is in a trance.

programme.title: Had To Be There/Girls Night In Part 1/Girls Night In Part 2/The Great Disaster/The Viewers Decide
programme.desc: So she isn't left out of inside jokes, the Titans time travel to past adventures and insert Bumblebee into their memories.

programme.title: Rotund Rabbit
programme.desc: Porky Pig takes a very painful trip.

programme.title: Squash Me If You Can
programme.desc: Sweetie competes in a cat vs. bird competition but faces pressure to win at all costs.

programme.title: I Got A New Aptitude
programme.desc: Buster, Plucky, and Hamton take an aptiTOON test that yields some surprising career prospects.

programme.title: The Promise/The Voice/The Boombox/The Castle/The Tape
programme.desc: Darwin has promised to play video games with Gumball, but there is a Banana Joe-shaped problem...

programme.title: Pain Rent
programme.desc: Bugs’ new roommate is a big, big problem.

programme.title: General Hogspital
programme.desc: Hamton gets into medical school but soon realizes it’s not at all what he imagined.

programme.title: Soufflé, Girl Hey
programme.desc: Babs and Buster are excited to get college jobs, but can they stand the heat cooking for the school chef?

programme.title: Shadow Play
programme.desc: When Tokang the puppeteer sets up his puppet show at Warung Muhibah, a few of its cast look oddly familiar.

programme.title: Pizza Hero/Sumo Goes West
programme.desc: Clarence is an original animated series.

programme.title: The Sale/The Routine/The Parking/The Upgrade/The Comic
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin do everything they can to stop Mr Robinson selling his house.

programme.title: Illuminated Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings are throwing a big birthday party but Grizzy tries to crash it due to his sensible eyes.

programme.title: Arcade Trouble/Alarm Bean
programme.desc: Teddy accidentally gets put in a claw machine as a prize!

programme.title: Frame The Feline
programme.desc: Hubie and Bertie risk it all to break into a cheese shop.

programme.title: The Slap/The Detective/The Fury/The Compilation/The Disaster
programme.desc: Gumball is offended when Tobias slaps everyone's behind except his.

programme.title: Muscle Mentor/Trucker Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: Rigby gets mentored by Muscle Man.

programme.title: Say Uncle/Reformed
programme.desc: A long lost relative of Steven's comes to town.

programme.title: Our House/Beard Hunter/Elasti-Bot/Negative Feels/New Chum
programme.desc: The Brain becomes a home inspector.

programme.title: Hashtag #1 Fan/Snow Place Like Home/Fiesta Day/Baba Yaga House/Bears In The Dark
programme.desc: Panda gets kidnapped by a pair of deranged French foxes.

programme.title: What Was Missing/Apple Thief/Beautopia/From Bad to Worse/No One Can Hear You
programme.desc: Finn and Jake do battle with a powerful door lord.

programme.title: Steven Floats/Too Short To Ride/Drop Beat Dad
programme.desc: Steven is so excited to be back home!

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Two mismatched New York City detectives seize an opportunity to step up like the city's top cops, whom they idolize, only things don't quite go as planned.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde
programme.desc: Upon graduating, Elle Woods travels to Washington D.C. with the intention of persuading the politicians to ban animal testing, but the task is easier said than done.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A young Navy lawyer risks his career to uncover the truth during a military trial.

programme.title: Rocky IV: Rocky Vs. Drago
programme.desc: Rocky Balboa proudly holds the world heavyweight boxing championship, but a new challenger has stepped forward: Drago, a six-foot-six, 261-pound fighter who has the backing of the Soviet Union.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Two mismatched New York City detectives seize an opportunity to step up like the city's top cops, whom they idolize, only things don't quite go as planned.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde
programme.desc: Upon graduating, Elle Woods travels to Washington D.C. with the intention of persuading the politicians to ban animal testing, but the task is easier said than done.

programme.title: Knight and Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Samuel Gerard and his team of Marshals are assigned to track down Sheridan, who has been accused of a double-murder.

programme.title: Baby Boom
programme.desc: The life of super-yuppie J.C. is thrown into turmoil when she inherits a baby from a distant relative.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明识破叶凌霜下毒计策，叶凌霜无法救七海蕊，只能与她一起离开夜北。七海蕊被选为和亲对象，叶凌霜决定陪她同去大晁。途中翼无忧出现试图救走七海蕊，但被界诸婴阻止。同时，大晁内部发生军令冲突，界海天私自调兵导致蓝衣军大败。叶凌霜得知彧修明真实身份后感到震惊。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 好搭档
programme.desc: 讲述人气离婚律师车恩京（张娜拉饰）陷入离婚危机，她与新人律师韩宥利（南志铉饰）经常因案件产生激烈冲突，一场律师间职场斗争即将上演。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵中枪入院，四海前来挑衅，十七气得要抢警务处处长的手枪射杀四海。桂新回到永业银行夺权，十七谎称桂婵已升他为总经理，代理其职务，获一众职员支持。桂婵发现公司没有自己依旧运作如常，内心失落。十七得悉后，率一班职员故意表现得没桂婵不行，哄桂婵开心；十七还骂醒桂新，要让他与桂婵兄妹重归于好。

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 夜北与大晁发生战争，大晁君主彧修明斩杀七海震宇，夜北战败。叶凌霜被俘，后利用智谋得到谢雨安的帮助逃到钦天监，被界海天收为徒弟。同时，她身上的琥珀石里困着星算大师云纹，二人达成合作。另一方面，彧修明决定迁移夜北人到越州，引起界海天和界诸婴的不满和困扰。

programme.desc: The U.S. Men's Clay Court Championships is an annual ATP Tour 250 tennis tournament held at the River Oaks Country Club in Houston, Texas. Founded in 1910, it is the only remaining tournament in the United States played on clay courts.

programme.title: Upper Austria Ladies Linz (500) QF 1 & 2 & 3
programme.desc: The Upper Austria Ladies Linz is a professional women's tennis tournament in the WTA Tour, first held in 1987. It is held at the Design Center Linz in Austria, featuring top-ranked players on indoor surfaces.

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) Day 1 Session 1
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Day 3 Round 2
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.
