programme.title: Escape from L.A.
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Why Hummingbird Hums
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hummingbird didn't hum. She was called Songbird and Songbird thought she could sing like a Bird… but sadly that was not the case. All the animals tried to help Songbird improve her singing but nothing worked. What could they do?! Then Tortoise has an idea, maybe Songbird can sing without opening her beak!! Songbird agrees and hums the most beautiful hum Tinga Tinga has ever heard. From that day on Songbird was called Hummingbird. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Baboon Has A Bare Bottom
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Baboon didn't have a bare bottom and he was very naughty. Baboon loved to play tricks. He played tricks on Elephant. He played tricks on Ostrich. He even dared to play tricks on Lion, the King of Tinga Tinga! And then all the animals decided it was time for the tricks to stop and Baboon to get a dose of his own medicine. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Runaway Bath
programme.desc: Pat must deliver an old bath tub to Pencaster Lighthouse. But when he goes to collect it from Thompson Ground, the bath ends up rolling away into Greendale with Jess inside! When Pat catches up with the bath he finds PC Selby about to impound it for being an un-road-worthy vehicle. Pat explains it's a Special Delivery and at last gets on his way.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is on holiday, so Sarah Gilbertson is looking after her dog Bonnie. She calls in on Pat and proves she has zero control over the dog. But there is only time for Jess to roll his eyes before Pat is called out on a special delivery - it's urgent! He has to deliver the RADARSCOPE (designed by Ted) to Mrs Goggins, who is up in Scotland! Pat has no idea what a radarscope is and neither does Ben. But they know what urgent means, so they spring into action and load it into Pat's jet plane.

programme.title: Simply The Best
programme.desc: Molecom is very grateful to Plugger for rescuing him after yet another of Flash's pranks. But Plugger is soon frustrated by Molecom's attempts to help… Meanwhile, Roary is trying hard to beat his best lap time.

programme.title: Cici Wins The Day
programme.desc: Cici is fed up with never winning and decides not to take part in the race that day. Can Roary persuade her to change her mind?

programme.title: Heavy Loader
programme.desc: Roary takes Loada on a jaunt to the beach… only to discover that sand and lorries don't mix too well!

programme.title: Testing Time For Maxi
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: The Case Of The Empty Swapsie Wagon
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is in charge of the Swapsy Game. Everyone puts a toy into the Swapsy Wagon and takes a toy out! It's brilliant fun - until the fairies yo yo. disappears from the wagon altogether. Cloppycorn's very upset. No one will trust him to pull the wagon again! Noddy tells him not to worry. He's going to investigate and help Cloppycorn find the missing toys.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unhappy Unicorn
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is very upset unhappy because his special felt ball, Snuggleball, is missing. Noddy needs to investigate quickly! He follows the clues around Fable Forest and discovers that PatPat broke snuggleball by mistake when she rode over it with her scooter. Noddy asks PatPat to make a new snuggleball but Cloppycorn doesn't like it. It doesn't feel cuddly like his special toy. Clever Noddy asks everyone in Toyland to give the new snuggleball a big hug.

programme.title: The Case Of The Sticker Mystery
programme.desc: New stickers, with a picture of a mysterious bandit, have appeared in Toyland. Clockwork Mouse begs Noddy to investigate. He finds himself going head to head with jealous Hoof who wants to prove that Noddy isn't the only investigator in Toyland. Hoof thinks he's solved the case in no time, but Noddy's attention to detail makes him realise the bandit isn't quite what he seems.

programme.title: The Case Of The Stolen Treasure
programme.desc: The pirates are having a spring clean of their galleon, much to the annoyance of Pirate Stripes who wants to go on a treasure hunt. Later that day, the pirate treasure disappears! Oh no! Noddy needs to investigate at once. A strange new galleon appears on the horizon. Could it be Tina the Terrible? Has she stolen the treasure? Using all his detecting skills Noddy follows the clues to the DareDale Caves where he realises that the ship on the horizon isn't Tina the Terrible's galleon at all.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Treasure Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Puff Enuf
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: Longest Yardwork / The Girl Who Cried Goose
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Things That Go Bump / Hide Like a Dew Drop
programme.desc: When "something" starts snatching things and causing havoc in Marcus' house, Phoebe and the Dew Drops investigate only to find that it's a stray kitten that they need to catch and find a home for before Marcus returns home. But in the end, Marcus decides to take the kitty in, as his own. / Lola isn't very good at "Hide & Seek" so the Dew Drops help her improve her game. But she becomes so good that no one can find her! And now she’s going to be late to her own surprise tea party!

programme.title: The Case Of The Empty Swapsie Wagon
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is in charge of the Swapsy Game. Everyone puts a toy into the Swapsy Wagon and takes a toy out! It's brilliant fun - until the fairies yo yo. disappears from the wagon altogether. Cloppycorn's very upset. No one will trust him to pull the wagon again! Noddy tells him not to worry. He's going to investigate and help Cloppycorn find the missing toys.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unhappy Unicorn
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is very upset unhappy because his special felt ball, Snuggleball, is missing. Noddy needs to investigate quickly! He follows the clues around Fable Forest and discovers that PatPat broke snuggleball by mistake when she rode over it with her scooter. Noddy asks PatPat to make a new snuggleball but Cloppycorn doesn't like it. It doesn't feel cuddly like his special toy. Clever Noddy asks everyone in Toyland to give the new snuggleball a big hug.

programme.title: The Case Of The Sticker Mystery
programme.desc: New stickers, with a picture of a mysterious bandit, have appeared in Toyland. Clockwork Mouse begs Noddy to investigate. He finds himself going head to head with jealous Hoof who wants to prove that Noddy isn't the only investigator in Toyland. Hoof thinks he's solved the case in no time, but Noddy's attention to detail makes him realise the bandit isn't quite what he seems.

programme.title: The Case Of The Stolen Treasure
programme.desc: The pirates are having a spring clean of their galleon, much to the annoyance of Pirate Stripes who wants to go on a treasure hunt. Later that day, the pirate treasure disappears! Oh no! Noddy needs to investigate at once. A strange new galleon appears on the horizon. Could it be Tina the Terrible? Has she stolen the treasure? Using all his detecting skills Noddy follows the clues to the DareDale Caves where he realises that the ship on the horizon isn't Tina the Terrible's galleon at all.

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Best Friends Day / The White Whale
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Shark and Pilot Fish / Theo
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Welcome to Pawston \ Ruff Day on the Job
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Dark Park Bark Lark \ The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. But when Tag and Scooch show up at the racetrack, there’s lots of competition. And to complete the first challenge - a pedal car race - they’re going to have to work together.

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: When Skrap-It gets struck by lightning, he's suddenly smart and comes up with a plan for D-Structs to remove the Dinotrux from the crater for good.on truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Lucky and the Fearless Fillies
programme.desc: When the PALs and Snips get caught in a sandstorm, the girls must keep Snips calm and safe

programme.title: Chalk The Line / Weighting Is The Hardest Part
programme.desc: Eep cheats her way into being considered an adult; Grug learns he's no longer the strongest caveman and turns to a radical method for building brawn

programme.title: Wrestlebabia: The Musica / Flowers For Munk
programme.desc: When Sandy can't join animal wrestling she poses as "Mandy Monkhuahua"; In order to help Munk, Grug sticks super worms up his nose that make him smarter

programme.title: Night Of The Hunters Pt 1
programme.desc: When Stormfly is captured by a new enemy, Ryker Grimborn, and the Dragon Hunters, Hiccup, Toothless and the team must rescue her before it's too late

programme.title: Night Of The Hunters Pt 2
programme.desc: As Hiccup and Snotlout race to rescue the others from Ryker and the Dragon Hunters, they don't realize Dagur and Heather are working with the enemy

programme.title: The Pinging
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Mister Mastodon
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Dollhouse Fairy Tales
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Happy CAT-O-Ween
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Ga Ba Goo Ba Ga (The Babblist)
programme.desc: There’s a new "babblist" in town- someone who claims to understand baby talk. Boss Baby spots this fraud right away;and must debunk his tactics before he scams the playgroup parents. Meanwhile;Tim tries to sell magazines with Boss Baby’s help.

programme.title: The Coo Chi Coup
programme.desc: Boss Baby loves awards- and the Golden Rattle trophy is no exception. When presented with the chance to win an award at a company retreat;he must choose between his pride and his team.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Org Chart!
programme.desc: Boss Baby creates an org chart to cement his leadership as the Boss of the playgroup babies. However when Bubbeezee photographer Travis Le Duque chooses anyone but Boss for his coverspread;the status quo is upended! Tim continues to fail his class assignment: a model solar system

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Angry Abnormal Atrocities of the Astute Animal Agressors
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Abysmal Altercation of the Abominable Altitooth
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Bout of the Beastly Barfilisk
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: Enter SH1FT3R
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Ghost Town Grand Prix
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: The Owl Job
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Out Of The Frying Pan
programme.desc: When the Eruptodon can't take its egg into the Great Volcano, Hiccup and Fishlegs must go into the dangerous volcano with the egg before it's too late.

programme.title: Twintuition
programme.desc: When the Twins journey to the Northern Markets to fix their prized mace, they end up stumbling onto a secret project by Viggo and the Dragon Hunters.

programme.title: Blindsided
programme.desc: A huge storm hits Dragon's Edge causing the Dragons to spook and run off but when Astrid is blinded, Hiccup must lead her to Stormfly.

programme.title: In Good Hands
programme.desc: When the new exchange students come to town, the kids are stopped from running an imperative errand.

programme.title: A House Divided
programme.desc: As the countdown to the Eternal Night approaches, Jim is enlightened in the truth about himself.

programme.title: Jimhunters
programme.desc: When Jim's friends discover the Trollhunter has gone through a transformation, Jim will test his newly gained abilities.

programme.title: Apok-ta-pokalypse Now Part 2
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: A Cause for The Paws
programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town. He loses his title as Dragon Master and teams up with Wandering Blade, a knight on a mission from England, to track down the weasels and get his title back.

programme.desc: A story that may end up crippling the network becomes more real; Maggie is un-friended.

programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Ángel Rodríguez
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Angel Rodriguez tells the tale of Nicole, a social worker, and her relationship with Angel, a bright but troubled inner-city teen.

programme.title: Save The Last Dance
programme.desc: A small-town girl with big dreams must face the biggest challenge of her life - to stay true to her dream and her new romance.

programme.title: The Second Civil War
programme.desc: A HBO Original Movie about how a simple immigration issue spins wildly out of control for those involved, ranging from the US President to a news producer.

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: A juror in a high-profile murder trial faces a serious moral dilemma… one that could sway the jury to convict or free the accused killer.

programme.title: Living With Lincoln
programme.desc: This documentary examines how a one-of-a-kind collection of Abraham Lincoln photos and memorabilia have shaped the lives and sensibilities of five generations of his family.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: The Brutalist' tracks the journey of László Toth, a Hungarian Jewish architect who, after surviving the Holocaust.

programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: Benjamin Vedrines, the mountaineer of every exploit
programme.desc: Originally from the Drome, in the small village of Chatillon-en-Diois, the professional mountaineer Benjamin Vedrines knows the ecrins massif well. Among other feats, he climbed the Dibona Needle in one hour and twenty-four minutes, a record-breaking performance achieved alone and without protection.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: C'est Du Belge
programme.desc: In the company of Gerald Watelet, focus on the best ambassadors of Belgian culture and heritage, on the behind-the-scenes of unmissable events and portraits of personalities making the news.

programme.title: The dog and the genie
programme.desc: A dog lived in a forest with her master who had been accused of sorcery and chased out of the village. Her master being a good man, the dog decided to go and see the genie to ask him to turn her into a woman.

programme.title: The meeting
programme.desc: The Komian finds Pokou and N'zi. She hurls a fireball towards the children but someone responds with an even more powerful ball of light.

programme.title: Shoes
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Let's play telling everyone everything
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Daddy Oum
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Saving Manouna
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Tresors Des Abbayes Et Des Cathedrales Francaises
programme.desc: With nearly 90,000 buildings, the oldest of which date back to the fourth century, France's religious heritage is exceptionally rich. Among these monuments, abbeys and cathedrals are the most visited. How were they born and what role did they play?

programme.title: Rohulla Hossiny (Afghanistan)
programme.desc: At 17, fleeing the Taliban, Rohullah Hossiny travels through Iran, Turkey, and Greece before arriving in Belgium. In Brussels, thanks to the Duo for a job association, he finds a mentor and joins Corica, where he becomes a master roaster. In turn, he trains other exiles.

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明识破叶凌霜下毒计策，叶凌霜无法救七海蕊，只能与她一起离开夜北。七海蕊被选为和亲对象，叶凌霜决定陪她同去大晁。途中翼无忧出现试图救走七海蕊，但被界诸婴阻止。同时，大晁内部发生军令冲突，界海天私自调兵导致蓝衣军大败。叶凌霜得知彧修明真实身份后感到震惊。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 好搭档
programme.desc: 讲述人气离婚律师车恩京（张娜拉饰）陷入离婚危机，她与新人律师韩宥利（南志铉饰）经常因案件产生激烈冲突，一场律师间职场斗争即将上演。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵中枪入院，四海前来挑衅，十七气得要抢警务处处长的手枪射杀四海。桂新回到永业银行夺权，十七谎称桂婵已升他为总经理，代理其职务，获一众职员支持。桂婵发现公司没有自己依旧运作如常，内心失落。十七得悉后，率一班职员故意表现得没桂婵不行，哄桂婵开心；十七还骂醒桂新，要让他与桂婵兄妹重归于好。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 夜北与大晁发生战争，大晁君主彧修明斩杀七海震宇，夜北战败。叶凌霜被俘，后利用智谋得到谢雨安的帮助逃到钦天监，被界海天收为徒弟。同时，她身上的琥珀石里困着星算大师云纹，二人达成合作。另一方面，彧修明决定迁移夜北人到越州，引起界海天和界诸婴的不满和困扰。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 铁扇公主
programme.desc: 一段紧张奇情的取西经故事，由孙悟空师徒行经火焰山，大战铁扇公主，白骨精及其妹妹展开。

programme.title: 阿牛出狱记
programme.desc: 续集中阿牛不幸的遭遇更令人心痛，当中不少更是笑中有泪的经历。阿牛出狱后，再遇爱人阿花，可惜她已嫁为人妻；另一方面，戆直的阿牛仍不断被狡猾的周大叔欺骗...

programme.title: 青春鼓王
programme.desc: 船员孙志强巧合成为「火花大乐队」的鼓手，他因急于成名，答应帮助音乐杂志出版人李源明接近乐队经理黄丽真，以换取源明的力捧。终于，志强得偿所愿，一炮而红，源明却逼他实践诺言，与丽真断绝来往。志强受到极大打击，唯有忍痛离开乐队与丽真...

programme.title: 斗气小神仙
programme.desc: 丁安安与雍晴两个表姐妹自小就读于同一所女校，因二人的母亲一向口和心不和，从小就向自己女儿灌输好胜思想，因此形成安安与晴从小斗到大，三日一小吵，五日一大斗。她们在校中认识了男同学米高及保罗，很快成为情侣，两对小冤家后来因斗气竟然互调了男朋友...

programme.title: 断魂谷
programme.desc: 断魂谷赵家庄主赵云阳有两弟子，赵玉龙和赵剑英。玉龙终年浪荡江湖，却得云阳所有财产。剑英不愤，害死师父嫁祸玉龙，幷引其子金虎追杀玉龙。两人在断魂谷决斗，剑英欲收渔人之利，幸金虎和玉龙发现谷中有埋伏，诈伤引出主谋，连手反攻...

programme.title: 云泥
programme.desc: 女主角熊素素因不能接受机师男友意外身亡而患上精神分裂症，一天巧遇留学归来的精神科医生黎易非，多次奇幻的相遇令易非和素素卷入三角恋和复杂的内心纠结之中。

programme.title: 清宫大刺杀
programme.desc: 雍正雄才大略，残忍狠毒，特组「血滴子」特务集团，以作暗杀反清人士的工具。不料，马腾不值雍正滥杀无辜，乃叛变潜逃出宫。雍正怕后患无穷，命御前侍卫刚振风及宣宝鹰，务必将马缉拿到手。马携妻儿在昔日同僚追杀下，辗转逃亡，匿于江南，开设打铁馆，并发明铁伞以破血滴子...

programme.title: 三十年细说从头
programme.desc: 大导演李翰祥改编自己大受欢迎的专栏，尽现电影圈光怪陆离的趣事及传闻，由爱将刘永和戴良纯扮演不同角色，保证令你捧腹大笑。

programme.title: 侠士行
programme.desc: 严太师遇刺毙命，护卫范义追击刺客至穷巷，见他踏镖逾墙逸去，而镖乃寇英之器，范遂遍城贴满通缉寇的画像。寇取得遇害县官宋化龙身上的公文，得以入城，却仍为范捉拿，幸得酒店店主的女儿雪娘，自认寇是其表哥，寇才幸免被捕；寇向雪道出自己的身份及真相。其后，范遭假扮成寇的寨主贺西雷袭击，而救回他的竟是......

programme.title: 摩登土佬
programme.desc: 这部音乐喜剧讲述青年贝小芬与好友汉堡饱在广告界内寻找真爱和成就的故事。

programme.title: 刺马
programme.desc: 张汶祥、黄纵与马新贻三人是结拜兄弟，可惜因为马新贻为达目的贪赃枉法，更倾慕黄纵的妻子，导致三人关系破裂，最终更血腥收场。

programme.title: 乾隆下扬州
programme.desc: 乾隆皇继续微服南巡，这次得大臣和大学士陪行，他们一行三人来到扬州，期间遇上不少趣事。

programme.title: 妖魂
programme.desc: 盛传很多武林中人在一夜间离奇消失，机智少侠欲查明真相，怎料当他发现原来是妖魂作怪时，他自己亦已身陷险境...

programme.title: Heart Of A Wolf
programme.desc: On the eve of their journey back to Alaska, Bird faces a life-changing crisis. Plus, Bear and Raiven decide to move up the mountain and begin their life as a family.

programme.title: Unleash The Beast
programme.desc: Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.

programme.title: Tanzania
programme.desc: Ed meets the Hadzabe of Tanzania, who live in balance with their environment, including collecting honey from the world's most aggressive bees.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid Colorado Straw Bale Home

programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Dr Danielle McMullen, President of AMA
programme.desc: Dr Danielle McMullen, President of AMA, addresses the National Press Club on the topic "Underpinning Australia's healthcare system: strengthening the base, not the facade".

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien (2026)
programme.desc: Jade Macmillan brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: Lehmo
programme.desc: Full time funny man Lehmo tries to whip up something French, whilst Alice tries to change his mind on mushrooms!

programme.title: The Pacific (2026)
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: Round 6 - Carlton v Collingwood
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 2) The Australian Dream
programme.desc: In the 1950s three quarters of Australians were homeowners. Nowadays, house prices have sky rocketed and younger generations largely feel locked out. So where did it all go wrong?

programme.title: Ambulance Australia S4
programme.desc: Since the onset of the COVID19 pandemic the number of mental health calls received by Queensland ambulance has increased. All part of a day's work for professionals who go into each shift not knowing what lies ahead.

programme.title: Play On S2
programme.desc: This episode looks at Fijian rugby in Melbourne, meeting a team of PALM Scheme workers, who have saved a club from collapse and are making a charge at the Grand Final. Plus we examine the ancient sport of Dragonboat.

programme.title: ABC Late News (2026)
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Jade Barker in Perth.

programme.title: The Business (2026)
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, investors, employees and businesses big and small. Presented by Alicia Barry.

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: Dora's Mermaid Adventure / Mermazing Surprise
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her school friends on a school bus trip to the mountains. From the top of the mountains there is a fantastic view and Peppa and her friends have fun hearing echoes. After a great day out, the bus takes the children home

programme.desc: Peppa and George are visiting their big cousin Chloe and her new baby brother, Alexander. Baby Alexander is too little to play games, but Peppa and Chloe have a great idea;

programme.title: Nature Trail

programme.title: The Cycle Ride
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are going for a day's cycle ride. Peppa loves cycling downhill but she's not so keen on peddling uphill. So, when the family meet all of Peppa's friends and decide to have a race, Peppa insists it should be a down hill race.

programme.title: Ice Skating
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating for the first time. Mummy Pig teaches Peppa to skate and soon she is having lots of fun. Peppa begins to teach George how to skate but it turns out he is a natural born skater. Peppa and George love ice-skating.

programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has built a fantastic little train called "Gertrude" and he takes Peppa and George for a ride. Along the way they meet their friends and they all hop aboard. Peppa and George think that "Gertrude" is the very best train in the whole world

programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.desc: Yumi's Yummy Honey is all the buzz when it - and her beehive - go missing from her farm! // Mayor Goodway's purse has disappeared! Along with its precious cargo - Chickaletta!

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 大梦想家
programme.desc: 主持谭凯萤游走台湾各地，深入市区黄金地段、新市镇发展潜力区域，探寻气派不凡的豪宅别墅与特色家居，细看《大梦想家》！移居台湾的港人，如何实现置业与创业梦想？多位「梦想家」分享当地的买楼故事与生活指南。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨 及 世界观
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: Holistic way+京都念慈庵:正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 东张西望

programme.title: 兄弟帮

programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: 吴邪私家笔记 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 吴邪解读帛书地图，与三叔组队探古墓，遇怪兽、铜鱼揭三叔往事，神秘女子阿宁现身后三叔失踪，新冒险展开。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 地球村民
programme.desc: 在全球化的大趋势，大家的生活息息相关。在八集节目中，邀请八位居港外国人分享其国家的文化特色。他们分别来自智利、乌克兰、日本、巴基斯坦、美国、瑞士等地。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导& 世界观 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: Holistic way+京都念慈庵:正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.desc: It's spring at CDMS and that can only mean one thing, time to impress all the other kids with your sense of fashion. But this year the competition for top fashionista gets so out of control that Pixiefrog institutes a school uniform policy.

programme.title: Pants In Space
programme.desc: Jake goes out for what he thinks is the Space Program.

programme.title: Shark Attack
programme.desc: Adam Lyon is the only human student in an all animal School

programme.title: Me Adam, You Jake
programme.desc: After losing the part of Tarzan in the school play to Jake Adam challenges his best buddy to a 'Tarzan-off' to see who really would make the best King of the Jungle.

programme.title: Lyon Of Scrimmage
programme.desc: Adam is made the school football team's quarterback.

programme.title: Abby Helps Cinderella
programme.desc: Cinderella's clock is broken but she needs to tell time for the ball!

programme.title: Lights! Camera! Share!
programme.desc: Rudy feels angry when Abby asks him to share his toys. Baby Bear shows Rudy how to use a glitter jar to help him calm his body.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po's new life as The Dragon Warrior is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain determined to conquer China and destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette and the Smurfs team up with new friends to save Papa Smurf after he's kidnapped and realize their destiny is to protect the universe.

programme.title: Yamacraw
programme.desc: Attending Uncle Phil's Black fraternity event helps Will find his groove with his family and peers as it becomes clear that his stay in Bel-Air will be more permanent.

programme.title: Restaurant Wars Part 2
programme.desc: The mayhem and drama continues of the biggest Restaurant Wars in the history of "Top Chef." Tom's announcement of a double elimination piles on even more pressure. "Top Chef" alum turned James Beard Award winning Chefs Karen Akunowicz and Nina Compton joi

programme.title: Abby Helps Cinderella
programme.desc: Cinderella's clock is broken but she needs to tell time for the ball!

programme.title: 错爱迷踪
programme.desc: 跟朋友在酒吧喝酒的女孩邂逅恐怖小说家，两人一见钟情感情迅速升温。原来女孩已悄然落入惊天迷局，全因小说家的前女友是个毁容的女鬼，她借用人面还魂复仇，与前男友联手开启夺命惊吓。

programme.title: 醉拳
programme.desc: 年轻气盛的黄飞鸿因招惹地方恶霸之子，被父亲送去跟随「醉拳大师」苏乞儿受训一年。当父亲揭发恶霸欲将国有矿产卖给日本人的阴谋后，顿成刺杀目标。为救父并阻止交易，飞鸿施展自创的「醉拳」，击败众杀手。

programme.title: 怪谈
programme.desc: 在迷雾村，为人养子的文杰反复梦见同一个噩梦。为了解开身世之谜，他卷入连串神秘的失踪案件中。随着更多村民相继离奇死去，村民更深信不疑千年来的井龙王诅咒。于是，文杰与保安队长联手探寻真相，揭开反派阴谋，最终拯救被危害的无辜村民.

programme.title: 叶问
programme.desc: 咏春大师叶问的功夫在中国各地备受推崇。正值日本侵华，叶问被迫离开家园并要找工作养家糊口。他唯有无奈地以咏春拳教导学生自卫训练，以赚取生活费用。

programme.title: 靓足100分
programme.desc: 林天赐的富商祖父病重，欲将遗产留给他，但条件是天赐要在一个月内结婚，否则遗产将归祖父侄儿罗伯特。不久天赐邂逅乐小小，两人渐生情愫。罗伯特即派玛丽琳利用美人计破坏他俩的感情。不料玛丽琳贪图遗产，准备真的与林结婚。罗心有不甘，捣乱婚礼，并揭发她的计谋...

programme.title: 叱咤风云
programme.desc: 车王李一飞不甘于过气的事实，为了争一口气证明自己，导致同队女车手吕莉莉发生意外，他所属的车队因此陷入倒闭危机。直至一名毫无赛道经验的虚拟赛车冠军选手加入车队，他的真实赛车表现竟超出预料。三人能否一起为车队重夺曾经拥有的辉煌与光荣？

programme.title: 靓女差馆
programme.desc: 雷女警长率领的港岛东刑事侦缉组的组员全是女警，因此有「靓女差馆」之称。警员生啤和沙爹对各女警一见难忘，遂主动申请调职到靓女差馆，意图接近众女并展开追求。这时，靓女差馆收到炸弹恐吓，她们最后能化解危机吗？

programme.title: 反收数特遣队
programme.desc: 在金融危机期间，绝大多数香港市民陷入债务困境。此时，贵利集团采取无情手段逼迫债务人还款，李探员与其地下部队誓言缉拿这个非法组织的头目。

programme.title: 破坏之王
programme.desc: 外卖员何金银为让他的女神阿丽对他刮目相看，发奋习武，并学了奇怪的招式。胆小怕事的他一次头戴加菲猫面具拯救了阿丽，不料事后被空手道大师段水流领功。银为揭穿真相，最终在擂台使出绝招"无敌风火轮"击败段大师，并抱得美人归。

programme.title: 缘份
programme.desc: 一个刚毕业的年青人在地铁站内邂逅一个美丽动人的女子，并对她一见钟情。在另一方面，他正被一个富家女展开追求。而此时他倾心的那女子，也正周旋于一个已婚男子之中。当那年青人向她表白时，那女子要求与他在地铁站内玩捉迷藏来决定大家的缘份！

programme.title: 冰封侠之时空行者
programme.desc: 《冰封侠：时空行者》承接前作，四位明朝锦衣卫在现代香港苏醒。为修正历史，贺英独自踏上了寻找「时空金球」的凶险旅程，却不知自己正一步步堕入精心布下的致命陷阱。

programme.title: 求爱敢死队
programme.desc: 失恋的王晶认识了电台节目主持曾志伟。志伟自诩情场杀手向王晶提供追求秘诀，但当其本身周旋于妻子与情人的关系当中，却不知如何是好...

programme.title: 回魂夜
programme.desc: 老妇神秘堕楼死亡，鬼魂于回魂夜当晚出现作祟。弄得一众大厦保安员不得安宁，并邀请了捉鬼大师Leo与女助手相助。Leo从老妇鬼魂得知，她是被儿子及媳妇所杀害，为了让老妇安息，Leo答应将夫妇二人绳之以法...

programme.title: 无味神探
programme.desc: 故事根据真人实事改编，讲述香港督察刘镇海个性暴躁又好色，毒枭阿军欲杀他自保，但只令海失去味觉和嗅觉。妻子不忍见丈夫负伤累累因此尽释前嫌、尽心照顾。阿军得知海幷未身亡，胁持其妻作为谈判筹码。海为了救出妻子，只身一人与毒枭展开生死决战...

programme.title: 惊心妒怨
programme.desc: 女模特余虹敏入住了一间公寓式医院，不久后在深夜离奇坠楼身亡。坊间开始流传该医院是「幽灵医院」。事后，余虹敏的摄影师在深夜频频接到诡异电话，撰稿人在一场离奇车祸后神志不清，而她的好友则神秘失踪...

programme.title: 鹿鼎记 II
programme.desc: 「神龙教」教主龙儿奉命协助吴三桂推翻康熙皇帝，却反遭吴三桂陷害，幸得韦小宝相救才得以保命。于是龙儿以身相许，并把绝世武功传于韦小宝以对付吴三桂。最后，韦小宝更意外地从四十二章经中得知满清龙脉的秘密宝藏。

programme.title: 风流冤鬼
programme.desc: 红歌女阿花遭大户陶老爷奸杀，陶宅即常闹鬼，后陶老爷亦神秘死亡。陶之后人陶明嗜赌如命，更因鬼魂作怪而欠下钜款。明妻暗中将陶宅售予杨教授夫妇，即遇上怪事连篇...

programme.title: 盲战
programme.desc: 前特警队长东谷在任务中罹患永久性失明，之后更被胁迫要承担任务失败的责任。幸好东谷在女儿的陪伴下逐渐走出阴霾，并开始适应黑暗的世界。可是曾经的宿敌再度出现，令女儿陷入危险之中。东谷为救女儿，展开了一场生死盲战。

programme.title: 冰封侠重生之门
programme.desc: 明朝锦衣卫贺英被诬陷为弑君逆贼，三位结义兄弟奉命追杀。在生死对决之际，四人意外被冰封于时空裂隙。四百年后，他们在现代香港苏醒。一场跨越时代的宿命之战，于陌生都市再度引爆。

programme.title: 花心大少
programme.desc: 严钱声是一名自恃追女高手的富家花花公子，被母亲劝喻要成家立室。他在寻找生命中的女主角时，被两个追女高手挑战。到底他最后能否找到心中最爱?

programme.title: 白发鬼
programme.desc: 年轻俊秀，生于名门望族的日籍华人林保，自幼失去父母，与大学好友川村感情深厚。二人都对美少女琉璃子心存爱慕，但川村自怜身世，不敢与林保争夺，林保顺利娶得琉璃子为妻。林保出国公干期间，川村和琉璃子耐不住寂寞，有了奸情。不久之后，林保竟在一次滑雪中意外身亡...

programme.title: 零号追杀
programme.desc: 退出江湖的特工华叔，在老街以开古董店为生。一天，老街遭当地青龙帮强拆时，华叔隐藏的身份被暴露，并受到阿杰为首的神秘组织追杀，由此展开了一场双雄对决!

programme.title: 逃学威龙三之龙过鸡年
programme.desc: 富商王百万被发现离奇死于酒店房间，由于周星星与他极为相似，星星再次接受任务，作卧底调查这宗谋杀案。王百万生前与妻子感情早已破裂，妻子因此成为头号嫌疑人。然而，在调查过程中，星星发现王百万的友人林大岳同样形迹可疑......

programme.title: 黑白潜行
programme.desc: 香港警员阿山以卧底身份潜伏在监狱，接近罪犯天哥，以获取其犯罪集团的更多证据。二人获释后，阿山全力帮助天哥扶摇直上，最终使天哥成为集团的主脑。然而，当阿山协助警方顺利摧毁犯罪集团时，他却意外揭开了天哥的一个惊天秘密...

programme.title: 青蛇：前缘
programme.desc: 千年前，青蛇在道清的点化下逐渐开化，生出与道清相守之心。因自己对道清的执念，却导致道清进入轮回之劫，遭受世间横死之难。为了化解道清的劫难，数百年间，青蛇不断寻找转世的道清...

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 叶问 2
programme.desc: 日本侵华后，咏春大师叶问与家人因生活艰难离开佛山，远赴香港开馆收徒，希望可以开展新生活。但事情并未如所想般容易，他欲在香港开武馆，就必须接受各大门派的挑战。一场又一场的功夫较量正式展开！

programme.title: 摩登仙履奇缘
programme.desc: 陈七是职业惯匪，偷呃拐骗无所不为，但从不使用暴力；张曼珠是电视台新晋演员，收入微薄，生活拮据。一次偶然中，陈得到了一枚巨钻，欲找买家脱手，却遇杀手追杀，情急下将巨钻藏于某鞋店的一只高跟鞋内，后来，此鞋刚好被张买去参加舞会......

programme.title: Real Betis v Braga - QF, 2nd Leg (Live) (170426)
programme.desc: The 55th season of the UEL as Europe's elite clubs compete in this premier football tournament.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。
